author: b.hartnett
content: <@131476523050860545> Are you able to share details of the hetzner machine model that is being used for the benchmarks? We are looking into getting Nimbus EL added to the benchmarking. If you can share a link to the exact model the other teams are using would be good.

author: skylenet
content: Dedicated AX42-U : ( 2x 512 GB NVMe SSD + 1x 3.84TB NVMe SSD Datacenter Edition )
